<!-- indicator: fig-limited-healthy-foods -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-limited-healthy-foods
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Population with Limited Access to Healthy Foods, 2015 and 2019'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Percentage of Population with Limited Access to Healthy Foods, 2015 and 2019.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-limited-healthy-foods", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
